'''Kaadi''' was a [[Phindian/Legends|Phindian]] who was good friends with the Derida brothers, [[Paxxi Derida|Paxxi]] and [[Guerra Derida|Guerra]], and assisted them in their uprising against the [[Syndicat]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. Her father, [[Nuuta]], was one of the renewed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
